exercises.sentence: Todos los días, yo ___ a la oficina a las ocho en punto.
exercises.translation: Every day, I arrive at the office at eight o'clock sharp.

exercises.sentence: Normalmente, yo ___ tarde cuando hay mucho tráfico en la ciudad.
exercises.translation: Normally, I arrive late when there is a lot of traffic in the city.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ a casa justo a tiempo para cenar con mi familia.
exercises.translation: I arrive home just in time to have dinner with my family.

exercises.sentence: ¿A qué hora ___ tú a la escuela cada mañana?
exercises.translation: What time do you arrive at school every morning?

exercises.sentence: Tú siempre ___ con flores para nuestra cita.
exercises.translation: You always arrive with flowers for our date.

exercises.sentence: Si tú ___ temprano, podemos comprar los boletos antes.
exercises.translation: If you arrive early, we can buy the tickets before.

exercises.sentence: Mi hermana ___ a la fiesta con muchos amigos.
exercises.translation: My sister arrives at the party with many friends.

exercises.sentence: El tren ___ a la estación exactamente a las diez.
exercises.translation: The train arrives at the station exactly at ten.

exercises.sentence: Usted ___ muy cansado después de trabajar todo el día.
exercises.translation: You arrive very tired after working all day.

exercises.sentence: Ayer yo ___ al aeropuerto dos horas antes del vuelo.
exercises.translation: Yesterday I arrived at the airport two hours before the flight.

exercises.sentence: Finalmente, yo ___ a la cima de la montaña después de caminar mucho.
exercises.translation: Finally, I arrived at the top of the mountain after walking a lot.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ a la conclusión de que necesitamos un coche nuevo.
exercises.translation: I arrived at the conclusion that we need a new car.

exercises.sentence: ¿A qué hora ___ tú al restaurante anoche?
exercises.translation: What time did you arrive at the restaurant last night?

exercises.sentence: Tú ___ a casa muy tarde después del concierto.
exercises.translation: You arrived home very late after the concert.

exercises.sentence: Tú ___ al final de la fila después de esperar media hora.
exercises.translation: You arrived at the end of the line after waiting half an hour.

exercises.sentence: Ella ___ a la clase justo cuando el profesor comenzaba.
exercises.translation: She arrived at class just when the teacher was starting.

exercises.sentence: El paquete ___ por correo esta mañana.
exercises.translation: The package arrived by mail this morning.

exercises.sentence: Usted ___ a un acuerdo con el vendedor ayer.
exercises.translation: You arrived at an agreement with the seller yesterday.

exercises.sentence: Cuando yo vivía en Madrid, siempre ___ temprano al trabajo.
exercises.translation: When I lived in Madrid, I always arrived early to work.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ a casa mientras el sol todavía brillaba.
exercises.translation: I used to arrive home while the sun was still shining.

exercises.sentence: Antes, yo ___ a todas mis clases con mucho entusiasmo.
exercises.translation: Before, I used to arrive at all my classes with a lot of enthusiasm.

exercises.sentence: ¿Por qué tú siempre ___ tarde a nuestras reuniones?
exercises.translation: Why did you always arrive late to our meetings?

exercises.sentence: Cuando eras niño, tú ___ al parque después de la escuela.
exercises.translation: When you were a child, you used to arrive at the park after school.

exercises.sentence: Tú ___ a casa llorando porque habías perdido tu juguete.
exercises.translation: You would arrive home crying because you had lost your toy.

exercises.sentence: Él ___ a la oficina mientras nosotros estábamos en una junta.
exercises.translation: He was arriving at the office while we were in a meeting.

exercises.sentence: La carta ___ siempre el mismo día de la semana.
exercises.translation: The letter always arrived the same day of the week.

exercises.sentence: Usted ___ puntual cada día a la oficina de su jefe.
exercises.translation: You used to arrive punctual every day to your boss's office.

exercises.sentence: Si tuviera un coche, yo ___ más rápido a mi destino.
exercises.translation: If I had a car, I would arrive faster at my destination.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ a un acuerdo si ellos fueran más honestos.
exercises.translation: I would reach an agreement if they were more honest.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ antes si no hubiera tanto tráfico en la carretera.
exercises.translation: I would arrive earlier if there wasn't so much traffic on the road.

exercises.sentence: ¿Tú ___ a tiempo si salieras ahora mismo?
exercises.translation: Would you arrive on time if you left right now?

exercises.sentence: Tú ___ lejos en tu carrera si te esforzaras más.
exercises.translation: You would go far in your career if you tried harder.

exercises.sentence: ¿Crees que tú ___ a la cima antes de que oscurezca?
exercises.translation: Do you think you would arrive at the top before it gets dark?

exercises.sentence: Ella ___ a ser una gran doctora si estudiara medicina.
exercises.translation: She would become a great doctor if she studied medicine.

exercises.sentence: El tren ___ a las seis si no hubiera retrasos.
exercises.translation: The train would arrive at six if there were no delays.

exercises.sentence: Usted ___ al éxito si trabajara con más dedicación.
exercises.translation: You would reach success if you worked with more dedication.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ a casa mañana por la tarde, no te preocupes.
exercises.translation: I will arrive home tomorrow afternoon, don't worry.

exercises.sentence: Si corro mucho, yo ___ primero a la meta.
exercises.translation: If I run a lot, I will arrive first at the finish line.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ a la oficina muy temprano el lunes próximo.
exercises.translation: I will arrive at the office very early next Monday.

exercises.sentence: ¿Cuándo ___ tú a la ciudad para las vacaciones?
exercises.translation: When will you arrive in the city for the vacations?

exercises.sentence: Tú ___ a ser un gran profesional con mucho estudio.
exercises.translation: You will become a great professional with a lot of study.

exercises.sentence: Si sigues este camino, tú ___ al centro en diez minutos.
exercises.translation: If you follow this path, you will arrive at the center in ten minutes.

exercises.sentence: Ella ___ a la fiesta después de terminar su trabajo.
exercises.translation: She will arrive at the party after finishing her work.

exercises.sentence: El vuelo ___ a la medianoche debido a la tormenta.
exercises.translation: The flight will arrive at midnight due to the storm.

exercises.sentence: Usted ___ a un acuerdo con ellos si habla sinceramente.
exercises.translation: You will reach an agreement with them if you speak sincerely.
